{{Quote|They're serving flatcakes at the buffet!|Wodibin declares that he has found flatcakes at the Canto Casino|<ref name="Ride" />}}
'''Trandoshani flatcakes''' were a variant of [[flatcake]] that shared their name with the [[Trandoshan]] [[species]]. During the [[Cold War]] between the [[First Order]] and the [[Resistance]], some of the most delicious Trandoshani flatcakes in [[the galaxy]] were served on a buffet at the [[Canto Casino and Racetrack|Canto Casino]] in the [[city]] of [[Canto Bight]] on the [[planet]] [[Cantonica]]. The [[Suerton]] [[Gambling|gambler]] [[Wodibin]] served himself a plate of the [[Cake|flatcakes]] and sauteed [[fruit]] which he brought with him to a table in the [[casino]] where the gamblers [[Kaljach Sonmi]] and [[Orisha Okum]] were playing [[pazaak]]. Near the table, the Suerton collided with the barkeeper [[Ganzer]], causing the plate of food and a tray of drinks Ganzer was carrying to spill onto Okum. The spill revealed an alterable pazaak card that she was using to cheat; however, Sonmi let her play it anyway. The card malfunctioned due to the spill and caused Okum to lose.<ref name="Ride" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trandoshani flatcakes first appeared in the short story "[[The Ride]]," which was written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and published as part of the [[Canto Bight (novella collection)|''Canto Bight'']] anthology book<ref name="Ride" /> on [[December 5]], [[2017]]. Miller had previously created [[Trandoshani flatcake/Legends|Trandoshani flatcake]]s for the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]] in [[2007]].<ref name="KOTOR15">[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]</ref>
